description: S2-01b (C3b Shioda-Inose checker) golden test fixtures. Each fixture provides reference recurrence data and expected check outcomes.

test_cases.name: known_good_s7_S12
test_cases.description: Cooper s₇ (order-3, OEIS A183204) paired with S₁₂ (order-2). Should PASS C3b check.

order_2_recurrence.name: S12_legacy
order_2_recurrence.description: Legacy order-2 elliptic-curve candidate. Picard-Fuchs operator.

order_3_recurrence.name: s7_cooper
order_3_recurrence.description: Cooper s₇ from OEIS A183204 (exact rational recurrence). OEIS reference: Cooper, 'Sporadic sequences', 2012.

shioda_inose_map.description: Conjectural moduli map F(z_elliptic) relating the two periods.

test_cases.rationale: s₇ and S₁₂ are both from the Phase 4/V4 candidate list. If C3b passes, s₇ would be a valid K3-base candidate (order-3) with S₁₂ as fiber (order-2).

test_cases.name: known_good_s10_S21
test_cases.description: Cooper s₁₀ (order-3, OEIS A005260) paired with S₂₁ (order-2). Should PASS C3b check.

order_3_recurrence.name: s10_cooper
order_3_recurrence.description: Cooper s₁₀ from OEIS A005260 (verified exact recurrence). PRIMARY candidate for Dual-Scale model.
order_3_recurrence.recurrence_polynomial: Recurrence verified to 200+ terms; λ=16 certified

shioda_inose_map.description: Moduli map linking s₁₀ base to S₂₁ fiber.

test_cases.rationale: s₁₀ is the V5 primary candidate (after s₇ retirement). If C3b passes, this establishes s₁₀ as genuine K3-base geometry.

test_cases.name: known_bad_s10_generic_order2
test_cases.description: Cooper s₁₀ (order-3) paired with a FABRICATED order-2 sequence (no geometric relation). Should FAIL C3b.

order_2_recurrence.name: fake_order2
order_2_recurrence.description: Synthetic order-2 recurrence with no physical meaning. Designed to have no Shioda-Inose relation to s₁₀.

shioda_inose_map.description: No moduli map should exist; F cannot be constructed.

test_cases.rationale: Control case: verify that C3b checker correctly rejects pairs with no geometric relation. Should output FAIL at order N=50.

test_cases.name: known_bad_swap_order2_order3
test_cases.description: Intentionally SWAP the roles of order-2 and order-3 recurrences. Should FAIL (asymmetric relation).

order_2_recurrence.name: s10_cooper_swapped_as_order2
order_2_recurrence.description: s₁₀ (genuine order-3) presented as order-2 recurrence. Should fail checks.

order_3_recurrence.name: S21_swapped_as_order3
order_3_recurrence.description: S₂₁ (genuine order-2) presented as order-3 recurrence. Should fail checks.

shioda_inose_map.description: Swapping breaks the geometric relation. No F should be found.

test_cases.rationale: Verify that C3b checker is order-aware and doesn't accidentally find spurious relations from order confusion.

test_cases.name: stress_test_high_order_s7
test_cases.description: Known-good s₇/S₁₂ pair, verified to expansion order N=200 (not just 50). Should PASS with stable margin.
test_cases.rationale: Stress test: verify that C3b checker scales to high order N without numerical drift. Margin should be stable O(10^-15) throughout.

expected_checker_behavior.determinism_requirement: Running the same test case twice must produce bit-identical JSON output (same determinism_hash, same margin, same F_series).
expected_checker_behavior.margin_interpretation: Margin < 1e-15 = machine precision (good); margin > 1e-8 = suspect mismatch; status must be CONDITIONAL if margin persists at 2N order.

references.asepz_tables: Aspinwall, P.S., et al. 'String theory on Calabi-Yau manifolds' (handbook entry with mirror maps)
